options.container_background: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 16%, rgba(56,189,248,.22), transparent 32%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 12%, rgba(251,113,133,.20), transparent 30%), radial-gradient(circle at 70% 88%, rgba(34,197,94,.16), transparent 35%), linear-gradient(135deg, #091117 0%, #14211d 50%, #211622 100%)

card.title: Interactive HTML card
card.html:
LLM import demo

Buttons, local JS and animation

This card proves that imported HTML cards can react without leaving the dashboard.

Ready
card.css: .hero-widget{height:100%;display:grid;align-content:center;gap:14px;padding:24px;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(56,189,248,.20),rgba(34,197,94,.11) 48%,rgba(251,113,133,.17));border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);position:relative}.hero-widget:before{content:'';position:absolute;right:-90px;bottom:-120px;width:280px;height:280px;border-radius:50%;background:conic-gradient(from 30deg,#38bdf8,#22c55e,#f59e0b,#fb7185,#38bdf8);filter:blur(18px);opacity:.34;animation:spin 10s linear infinite}.hero-widget>*{position:relative}span{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#a7f3d0;font-weight:900}h2{margin:0;color:#fff;font-size:30px;line-height:1.05}p{margin:0;color:rgba(226,232,240,.82);line-height:1.45}.row{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}button{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);border-radius:14px;padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.11);color:#fff;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer}button:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);background:rgba(255,255,255,.17)}output{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);color:#dbeafe}.pulse{animation:pulse .72s ease}@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}@keyframes pulse{50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(34,197,94,.24),0 0 46px rgba(56,189,248,.36)}}

card.title: No layerIds
card.content: This standard Markdown card intentionally has no `layerIds`. Per README, cards without a layer stay visible for backward compatibility.

card.title: HTML service console
card.html:
Actions layer

Service-safe buttons

These buttons try to call Home Assistant helpers when the included package is synced. The widget still works as a local demo if the helpers are missing.

Waiting for input
card.js: const box=root.querySelector('.console');const out=root.querySelector('[data-out]');let local=0;function bump(msg){box.classList.remove('flash');void box.offsetWidth;box.classList.add('flash');out.textContent=msg;}helpers.listen(root.querySelector('[data-toggle]'),'click',async()=>{try{await helpers.callService('homeassistant','toggle',{entity_id:'input_boolean.ddc_demo_flow'});bump('Called homeassistant.toggle');}catch(e){bump('Local fallback: toggle unavailable');}});helpers.listen(root.querySelector('[data-load]'),'click',async()=>{try{await helpers.callService('input_number','set_value',{entity_id:'input_number.ddc_demo_load',value:73});bump('Set demo load to 73');}catch(e){bump('Local fallback: load helper unavailable');}});helpers.listen(root.querySelector('[data-local]'),'click',()=>{local+=1;bump('Local event count: '+local);});return {update(){}};

card.title: Standard layer
card.html:
StandardMain objects

This layer holds the normal dashboard cards.

card.text:
### Explainers layer
Turn off `Explainers` to hide help text and connector notes while leaving the dashboard itself intact.
No layer assigned: this stays visible when individual layers are toggled off.

card.title: Viewport cards
card.html:
Desktop1440 x 920Base cards
TabletLandscape + portraitSame IDs, new geometry
MobileStacked layoutPortrait optimized

card.text: This file keeps card IDs stable across profiles. Tablet and mobile layouts only redefine position and size, while card config falls back to the desktop/base entry.

card.title: Dashboard property cockpit
card.css: .property-lab{height:100%;min-height:0;box-sizing:border-box;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto auto 1fr auto;gap:14px;padding:18px;border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,23,31,.94),rgba(31,25,18,.92) 54%,rgba(14,31,27,.92));border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:#f8fafc;overflow:hidden}.boot{height:100%;display:grid;place-content:center;gap:10px;text-align:center}.boot span,.eyebrow{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:900;color:#fbbf24}.boot strong{font-size:28px}.top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.15fr) minmax(320px,.85fr);gap:14px;align-items:stretch}.headline{display:grid;gap:10px;align-content:center;min-width:0}.headline h2{margin:0;font-size:36px;line-height:1.02;color:#fff}.headline p{margin:0;max-width:74ch;color:rgba(226,232,240,.82);line-height:1.42}.metrics{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:9px}.metric{min-width:0;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);padding:12px}.metric strong{display:block;font-size:26px;line-height:1;color:#fbbf24}.metric span{display:block;margin-top:7px;color:rgba(226,232,240,.76);font-size:12px}.toolbar{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:9px;align-items:center;padding:10px;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(2,6,23,.32);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09)}.toolbar label{display:inline-flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;color:rgba(226,232,240,.82);font-size:12px}.toolbar input{accent-color:#fbbf24}.toolbar button,.group button,.feature button{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);border-radius:13px;padding:10px 12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:#f8fafc;font-weight:850;cursor:pointer;min-width:0}.toolbar button.primary{background:#fbbf24;color:#1f1300;border-color:#fbbf24}.toolbar button.ok{background:#34d399;color:#052e1b;border-color:#34d399}.toolbar button.warn{background:#fb7185;color:#330812;border-color:#fb7185}.toolbar button:hover,.group button:hover,.feature button:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);filter:brightness(1.07)}.body{min-height:0;display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 360px;gap:14px}.groups{min-height:0;overflow:auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px;padding-right:4px}.group{min-width:0;align-self:start;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11);border-radius:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);overflow:hidden}.group h3{margin:0;padding:13px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);font-size:15px;color:#fff}.rows{display:grid}.row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(120px,.82fr) minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:9px;align-items:center;padding:10px 14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)}.row:first-child{border-top:0}.key{font-size:12px;color:#bae6fd;font-weight:850;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.value{min-width:0;color:rgba(241,245,249,.86);font-size:12px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}.value code{font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,Consolas,monospace;font-size:11px;color:#d1fae5}.pill{justify-self:end;border-radius:999px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:900;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:#cbd5e1}.pill.on{background:rgba(52,211,153,.18);border-color:rgba(52,211,153,.45);color:#86efac}.pill.off{background:rgba(251,113,133,.13);border-color:rgba(251,113,133,.35);color:#fecdd3}.row button{justify-self:end;padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px}.side{min-height:0;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr auto;gap:12px}.panel{min-width:0;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11);border-radius:18px;background:rgba(2,6,23,.34);overflow:hidden}.panel h3{margin:0;padding:13px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);font-size:15px}.features{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;padding:12px}.feature{min-width:0;border-radius:14px;padding:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)}.feature strong{display:block;font-size:12px;color:#fff}.feature span{display:block;margin-top:5px;font-size:11px;color:rgba(226,232,240,.72);line-height:1.28}.json{min-height:0;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr}.json pre{margin:0;padding:13px;min-height:0;overflow:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;font-size:11px;line-height:1.4;color:#d1fae5;background:rgba(2,6,23,.42)}.log{min-height:38px;padding:11px 12px;border-radius:14px;background:rgba(2,6,23,.48);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#e0f2fe;font-size:12px}.error{height:100%;display:grid;place-content:center;gap:12px;text-align:center;padding:24px}.error strong{font-size:26px}.error span{color:rgba(226,232,240,.78)}@media(max-width:980px){.top,.body{grid-template-columns:1fr}.groups{grid-template-columns:1fr}.side{grid-template-rows:auto auto auto}.metrics{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}
card.js:
const api=ddc||helpers.ddc||helpers.dashboard;const shell=root.querySelector('[data-ddc-property-lab]');if(!shell)return;if(!api||!api.settings){shell.innerHTML='
Dashboard API unavailableThis HTML card will run once it is inside a Drag & Drop Card canvas.
';return {update(){}};}const owner=api.card||{};const groupDefs=[{id:'layout',title:'Layout and snapping',keys:['grid','drag_live_snap','disable_overlap','container_size_mode','container_fixed_width','container_fixed_height','container_preset','container_preset_orientation','auto_resize_cards','optimize_for_mobile','mobile_dynamic_behavior','do_not_resize_text','outer_grid_buffer']},{id:'persistence',title:'Persistence and editing',keys:['storage_key','auto_save','auto_save_debounce','debug','edit_mode_pin']},{id:'visual',title:'Card and theme styling',keys:['container_background','apply_background_to_page','card_background','card_shadow','animate_cards','dashboard_theme_enabled','dashboard_theme','dashboard_theme_override_all_design']},{id:'tabs',title:'Tabs and layers',keys:['tabs','tabs_position','default_tab','hide_tabs_when_single','layers_enabled','layers']},{id:'chrome',title:'Home Assistant chrome',keys:['hide_HA_Header','hide_HA_Sidebar']},{id:'backgrounds',title:'Background engines',keys:['background_mode','background_image','background_particles','background_youtube']},{id:'screensaver',title:'Screen saver',keys:['screen_saver_enabled','screen_saver_delay','screen_saver_style','screen_saver_entities']},{id:'responsive',title:'Responsive authoring',keys:['responsive_viewports','responsive_connectors','connectors']}];const cycles={tabs_position:['left','top','bottom'],background_mode:['image','particles','youtube','none'],container_size_mode:['fixed_custom','dynamic','auto','preset'],container_preset:['fhd','qhd','iphone-14-pro','ipad-11-pro','ultrawide-uwqhd'],container_preset_orientation:['auto','landscape','portrait'],mobile_dynamic_behavior:['scale','native'],screen_saver_style:['visionos_glass','minimal_scandi','ultra_minimal_dots']};const booleanKeys=new Set((api.settings.list()||[]).filter((item)=>item.type==='boolean'||item.boolean).map((item)=>item.key));const read=()=>api.settings.options?api.settings.options():api.settings.all();const esc=(value)=>String(value==null?'':value).replace(/[&<>"']/g,(ch)=>({'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"',"'":'''}[ch]));function countCards(){try{return owner.cardContainer?owner.cardContainer.querySelectorAll('.card-wrapper').length:0;}catch(e){return 0;}}function countConnectors(opts){const rc=opts.responsive_connectors||{};let count=0;Object.values(rc).forEach((profile)=>{if(!profile||typeof profile!=='object')return;if(Array.isArray(profile.connectors))count+=profile.connectors.length;Object.values(profile).forEach((entry)=>{if(entry&&Array.isArray(entry.connectors))count+=entry.connectors.length;});});return count;}function summarize(value,key){if(key==='edit_mode_pin')return value?'configured':'empty';if(Array.isArray(value))return value.length+' items';if(value&&typeof value==='object'){const keys=Object.keys(value);if(key==='responsive_connectors')return countConnectors({responsive_connectors:value})+' connectors';return keys.length+' keys';}if(typeof value==='boolean')return value?'on':'off';if(value==null||value==='')return 'empty';return String(value);}function detailValue(value,key){if(key==='edit_mode_pin')return value?'configured':'empty';if(Array.isArray(value))return JSON.stringify(value.slice(0,3));if(value&&typeof value==='object')return JSON.stringify(value).slice(0,180);return String(value==null?'':value);}function buttonFor(key,value){if(booleanKeys.has(key))return '';if(cycles[key])return '';if(key==='grid')return '';if(key==='auto_save_debounce')return '';if(key==='screen_saver_delay')return '';return 'Read';}function renderRows(keys,opts,seen){return keys.map((key)=>{seen.add(key);const value=opts[key];return '
'+esc(key)+'
'+esc(summarize(value,key))+'
'+buttonFor(key,value)+'
';}).join('');}function render(detail){const opts=read()||{};const list=api.settings.list()||[];const allKeys=list.map((item)=>item.key);const seen=new Set();let groups=groupDefs.map((group)=>'

'+esc(group.title)+'

'+renderRows(group.keys.filter((key)=>allKeys.includes(key)||Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(opts,key)),opts,seen)+'
').join('');const other=allKeys.filter((key)=>!seen.has(key));if(other.length)groups+='

Other exportable settings

'+renderRows(other,opts,seen)+'
';const tabs=Array.isArray(opts.tabs)?opts.tabs:[];const layers=Array.isArray(opts.layers)?opts.layers:[];const packages=Array.isArray(owner._dashboardPackages)?owner._dashboardPackages.length:0;const activeToggles=list.filter((item)=>item.boolean&&item.value).length;const cards=countCards();const connectors=countConnectors(opts);const snapshot={storage_key:opts.storage_key,grid:opts.grid,container_size_mode:opts.container_size_mode,tabs_position:opts.tabs_position,background_mode:opts.background_mode,layers_enabled:opts.layers_enabled,screen_saver_enabled:opts.screen_saver_enabled,animate_cards:opts.animate_cards,visible_cards:cards,connector_entries:connectors,packages:packages};shell.innerHTML='
custom:ddc-html-card / ddc.settings

One card, every dashboard property

Use this cockpit to inspect and change the Drag & Drop Card options that an LLM can author in import JSON.

'+list.length+'settings
'+activeToggles+'active toggles
'+tabs.length+'/'+layers.length+'tabs / layers
'+connectors+'connectors
'+groups+'

Feature coverage

Drag / resizeGrid, live snap and overlap settings.
Tabs / layersVisibility systems with stable IDs.
BackgroundsImage, particles, YouTube and none.
ResponsiveViewport profiles and connector overlays.
PersistenceAuto-save, manual save and storage key.
Packages'+packages+' helper package exported with this demo.

Live option snapshot

'+esc(JSON.stringify(snapshot,null,2))+'
'+(detail&&detail.keys?'Changed: '+esc(detail.keys.join(', ')):'Ready')+'
'; }function persistOpt(){return {persist:!!root.querySelector('[data-persist]')?.checked};}async function setPatch(patch){await api.settings.setMany(patch,persistOpt());render({keys:Object.keys(patch)});}helpers.listen(shell,'click',async(ev)=>{const target=ev.target.closest('button');if(!target)return;const key=target.dataset.toggle;if(key){const next=await api.settings.toggle(key,persistOpt());render({keys:[key]});return;}const cycleKey=target.dataset.cycle;if(cycleKey){const values=cycles[cycleKey]||[];const current=api.settings.get(cycleKey);const index=values.indexOf(current);await api.settings.set(cycleKey,values[(index+1+values.length)%values.length],persistOpt());render({keys:[cycleKey]});return;}if(target.dataset.grid!==undefined){const current=Number(api.settings.get('grid')||20);const next=current>=40?10:current+10;await api.settings.set('grid',next,persistOpt());render({keys:['grid']});return;}if(target.dataset.debounce!==undefined){const current=Number(api.settings.get('auto_save_debounce')||800);const values=[250,700,1200,2000];const next=values[(Math.max(0,values.indexOf(current))+1)%values.length];await api.settings.set('auto_save_debounce',next,persistOpt());render({keys:['auto_save_debounce']});return;}if(target.dataset.saverDelay!==undefined){const current=Number(api.settings.get('screen_saver_delay')||600000);const values=[60000,300000,600000,1200000];const next=values[(Math.max(0,values.indexOf(current))+1)%values.length];await api.settings.set('screen_saver_delay',next,persistOpt());render({keys:['screen_saver_delay']});return;}const preset=target.dataset.preset;if(preset==='demo')return setPatch({tabs_position:'left',background_mode:'image',container_size_mode:'fixed_custom',container_fixed_width:1440,container_fixed_height:920,grid:20,drag_live_snap:true,auto_save:true,animate_cards:true,card_shadow:true,layers_enabled:true,screen_saver_enabled:true,hide_HA_Header:false,hide_HA_Sidebar:false});if(preset==='kiosk')return setPatch({tabs_position:'bottom',hide_HA_Header:true,hide_HA_Sidebar:true,screen_saver_enabled:true,background_mode:'youtube',animate_cards:true,card_shadow:false});if(preset==='mobile')return setPatch({container_size_mode:'preset',container_preset:'iphone-14-pro',container_preset_orientation:'portrait',tabs_position:'top',mobile_dynamic_behavior:'scale',optimize_for_mobile:true,do_not_resize_text:false});if(preset==='quiet')return setPatch({background_mode:'none',animate_cards:false,card_shadow:false,screen_saver_enabled:false,hide_tabs_when_single:false});const command=target.dataset.command;if(command==='save-settings'){await api.settings.save();render({keys:['settings.save']});return;}if(command==='save-layout'){await api.saveLayout(false);render({keys:['saveLayout']});return;}if(command==='open-settings'){api.openSettings();return;}});const off=api.settings.subscribe((detail)=>render(detail));render();return()=>off();

packages.name: DDC Demo Helpers
packages.yaml:
input_boolean:
  ddc_demo_flow:
    name: DDC Demo Flow
    icon: mdi:transit-connection-variant
  ddc_demo_alert:
    name: DDC Demo Alert
    icon: mdi:alarm-light-outline
input_number:
  ddc_demo_load:
    name: DDC Demo Load
    min: 0
    max: 100
    step: 1
    unit_of_measurement: "%"
    icon: mdi:gauge
input_select:
  ddc_demo_scene:
    name: DDC Demo Scene
    options:
      - Morning
      - Focus
      - Evening
      - Night
    icon: mdi:palette-outline
template:
  - sensor:
      - name: DDC Demo Load Percent
        unique_id: ddc_demo_load_percent
        unit_of_measurement: "%"
        state: "{{ states('input_number.ddc_demo_load') | float(42) }}"
      - name: DDC Demo Status
        unique_id: ddc_demo_status
        state: "{{ states('input_select.ddc_demo_scene') }}"
